## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Jason Gong and Edin Abazi to discuss ongoing projects and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website redesign for GrowthX is a high priority; Murgam is close to completing initial pages](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [PostHog and GTM implementation across multiple sites (GrowthX, AI-led growth, the output) is in progress](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Merging ALL growth and the output content/design is planned but challenging due to style differences](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX website coding implementation estimated to take at least a week](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Personal Check-in and City Safety Discussion

  - [Jason shared weekend activities, including a daycare potluck and visit to Golden Gate Park](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Discussed safety perceptions of San Francisco, noting recent improvements](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Compared safety in US cities to European locations (Frankfurt, Paris, London)](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Touched on cultural differences regarding homelessness and petty crime in China vs. US](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### Travel Experiences

  - [Edin has traveled extensively in Europe, part of the Schengen zone for free travel](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Jason has visited various European countries for work and vacation](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Noted that Americans generally travel less internationally due to distance and cost](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

### Website Redesign and Implementation

  - [Murgam is working on GrowthX website, nearing completion of 3-4 required pages](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Jason plans to add comments on positioning and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Edin estimates at least a week for coding implementation due to codebase complexity](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Team to schedule a live discussion to address design thoughts and potential changes](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Analytics and Tracking Implementation

  - [Edin implementing PostHog events tracking across multiple sites](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Adding Google Tag Manager (GTM) to AI-led growth and the output](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Jason to handle whitelisting domains for various tracking pixels (LinkedIn, Hotjar, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

### ALL Growth and The Output Merger

  - [Plan to merge content from the output into ALL growth](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Challenge: Conflicting design styles (playful vs. serious/dark)](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Immediate goal: Launch newsletter section, iterate on style later](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Search Project Update

  - [Project mostly complete on the team's end](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Awaiting client's CEO approval for publication](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to add comments to the GrowthX website design](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Edin to continue PostHog and GTM implementation across sites](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Schedule a meeting with Ren to discuss website design thoughts and changes](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Jason to whitelist domains for tracking pixels on various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Prioritize GrowthX website redesign implementation](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Edin to work on merging ALL growth and the output codebases and CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Consider setting up a regular sync between Edin and Ren for better collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/P4VkcyLzEexVRPf_Hssxyjf7s3t87-bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
